phyllis.action: Excuse myself from the pleasantries and head to the restroom first, then I’ll grab some coffee and properly settle in.
phyllis.currently: Just got in and I’m stepping away for a quick restroom break before I start my morning.

kelly.action: Head straight to the restroom first, then come back ready to spill the news.
kelly.currently: Beelining to the restroom, mentally rehearsing the dramatic entrance for later.

creed.action: Slip away before anyone clocks me and head straight for the restroom.
creed.currently: Gone for a minute. Don’t follow me.

meredith.action: Bee-lining to the bathroom first thing, coffee in hand.
meredith.currently: Slightly rumpled, large coffee, looking forward to nothing in particular.

stanley.action: Head straight to the restroom before settling in.
stanley.currently: At his desk. Crossword is ready. Leave him alone.

oscar.action: Quick bathroom break before settling in with coffee and emails.
oscar.currently: Detouring to the restroom before I start on emails and receivables.

ryan.action: Bee-lining to the restroom to handle the most urgent human KPI before doing anything 'strategic.'
ryan.currently: Executing a quick, necessary pit stop like it was on the roadmap all along.

toby.action: Head straight to the restroom to take care of the most pressing physical need before settling in.
toby.currently: Trying to get settled in without making a big deal out of anything.

dwight.action: Heading directly to the restroom before beginning security patrol — bladder urgency is too high to ignore.
dwight.currently: Arrived at Dunder Mifflin — addressing urgent biological need before commencing security patrol.

kevin.action: Heading straight to the bathroom before doing anything else.
kevin.currently: Still proud of the parking spot, now racing the clock.

angela.action: Head straight to the restroom to take care of a pressing need, then return to start desk setup.
angela.currently: Arrived and immediately prioritizing a quick restroom stop before starting the day properly.

pam.action: Heading to the restroom quickly before settling in at reception.
pam.currently: Stepping away from reception for a quick restroom break before starting the morning routine.

michael.action: Rushing to the bathroom because nature is SCREAMING right now — even the World's Best Boss has limits
michael.currently: Quietly speed-walking to the bathroom before anyone notices, trying to look purposeful and boss-like about it.

jim.action: Heading to the kitchen to grab coffee and food before settling in
jim.currently: Making a beeline for the kitchen — Dwight can wait five minutes.

events.detail: Urgent physical needs (bladder/energy) override social settling-in right now.

No current plan block is active and the immediate physical need overrides the scheduled “arrive_mysterious” beat.
Taking care of a basic need first so I can actually stick to coffee + crossword after.
Taking a necessary restroom break first so I can focus without interruptions.
